title: Threat Assessment Protocol
summary: Evaluating enemy ships to determine threat level and priority.
details: Assess each enemy: ship class (fighter/cruiser/capital), damage state, weapon loadout, current behavior (attacking/defending/fleeing), position relative to you. Highest threats: ships actively engaging you, ships with heavy weapons in range, ships coordinating with others. Lower threats: damaged ships, ships engaged elsewhere, ships outside effective range. Update assessment as battle evolves.
annotations: Misreading threat levels leads to catastrophic decisions.
Watch for enemy reinforcements changing threat picture.
